name: erdlens
description: MCP server that turns your schema (SQL, Prisma, Drizzle, TypeORM, SQLAlchemy) into a Mermaid ERD, writes it straight into your docs, and flags when the diagram drifts from the schema. Zero dependencies.

scripts.test: npm run build && node test/erd.test.mjs && node test/flow.test.mjs && node test/mcp.test.mjs
scripts.tune: npm run build && node dist/index.js tune
